ddls:
CREATE TABLE "orders" (
  "order_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each order */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the customer who placed the order */,
  "order_date" TEXT /* Date and time when the order was placed */,
  "total_amount" REAL /* Total amount for the order including taxes and fees */,
  "shipping_address" TEXT /* Shipping address for the order */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the order (e.g., pending, shipped, delivered) */,
  "order_type" TEXT /* Type of order (e.g., standard, express, bulk) */,
  "payment_status" TEXT /* Status of payment (e.g., paid, unpaid, pending) */,
  "discount_code" TEXT /* Discount code applied to the order */,
  "tax_amount" REAL /* Tax amount for the order */,
  "shipping_method" TEXT /* Method of shipping (e.g., standard, next day) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("order_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_orders_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customers" (
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each customer */,
  "customer_name" TEXT /* Full name of the customer */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the customer */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the customer */,
  "registration_date" TEXT /* Date when the customer registered on the platform */,
  "address" TEXT /* Billing address of the customer */,
  "city" TEXT /* City of the customer */,
  "state" TEXT /* State of the customer */,
  "zip_code" TEXT /* Zip code of the customer */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country of the customer */,
  "is_email_verified" INTEGER /* Indicates if the email is verified */,
  "last_activity_date" TEXT /* Date of the last activity on the platform */,
  "loyalty_points" INTEGER /* Loyalty points accumulated by the customer */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "products" (
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each product */,
  "product_name" TEXT /* Name of the product */,
  "price" REAL /* Price of the product */,
  "stock_quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the product available in stock */,
  "category" INTEGER /* Category to which the product belongs */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the product */,
  "image_url" TEXT /* URL to the product image */,
  "weight" REAL /* Weight of the product */,
  "dimensions" TEXT /* Dimensions of the product (e.g., 10x10x10 cm) */,
  "manufacturer" TEXT /* Manufacturer of the product */,
  "warranty_period" INTEGER /* Warranty period in months */,
  "rating" REAL /* Average rating of the product */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_products_category FOREIGN KEY ("category") REFERENCES categories ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "order_items" (
  "order_item_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each order item */,
  "order_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the order that contains this item */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the product being ordered */,
  "quantity_ordered" INTEGER /* Quantity of the product ordered */,
  "price_each" REAL /* Price per unit of the product */,
  "discount_amount" REAL /* Discount amount for the item */,
  "tax_amount" REAL /* Tax amount for the item */,
  "item_status" TEXT /* Status of the item (e.g., shipped, backordered) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("order_item_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_order_items_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_order_items_order_id FOREIGN KEY ("order_id") REFERENCES orders ("order_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "shipping" (
  "shipping_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each shipping record */,
  "order_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the order being shipped */,
  "shipping_date" TEXT /* Date when the order was shipped */,
  "carrier" TEXT /* Carrier responsible for shipping (e.g., UPS, FedEx) */,
  "tracking_number" TEXT /* Tracking number provided by the carrier */,
  "estimated_delivery_date" TEXT /* Estimated delivery date */,
  "actual_delivery_date" TEXT /* Actual delivery date */,
  "delivery_status" TEXT /* Status of the delivery (e.g., in transit, delivered) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("shipping_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_shipping_order_id FOREIGN KEY ("order_id") REFERENCES orders ("order_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "returns" (
  "return_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each return record */,
  "order_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the order being returned */,
  "return_date" TEXT /* Date when the return was initiated */,
  "reason" TEXT /* Reason for the return (e.g., defective, no longer needed) */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the return (e.g., pending, completed) */,
  "refund_amount" REAL /* Amount refunded for the return */,
  "refund_date" TEXT /* Date when the refund was processed */,
  "return_method" TEXT /* Method of return (e.g., mail, in-store) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("return_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_returns_order_id FOREIGN KEY ("order_id") REFERENCES orders ("order_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "payments" (
  "payment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each payment record */,
  "order_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the order associated with the payment */,
  "payment_date" TEXT /* Date when the payment was made */,
  "amount" REAL /* Amount paid for the order */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Method of payment (e.g., credit card, PayPal) */,
  "transaction_id" TEXT /* Unique transaction ID from the payment gateway */,
  "payment_status" TEXT /* Status of the payment (e.g., successful, failed) */,
  "payment_notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the payment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("payment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_payments_order_id FOREIGN KEY ("order_id") REFERENCES orders ("order_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the category */,
  "parent_category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the parent category (for hierarchical categories) */,
  "image_url" TEXT /* URL to the category image */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_categories_parent_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("parent_category_id") REFERENCES categories ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reviews" (
  "review_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each review */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the product being reviewed */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the customer who wrote the review */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating given by the customer (e.g., 1-5 stars) */,
  "comment" TEXT /* Comment provided by the customer */,
  "review_date" TEXT /* Date when the review was written */,
  "helpful_votes" INTEGER /* Number of votes indicating the review is helpful */,
  "unhelpful_votes" INTEGER /* Number of votes indicating the review is not helpful */,
  "is_feature_review" INTEGER /* Indicates if the review is a featured review */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("review_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reviews_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reviews_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role (e.g., admin, customer service, user) */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Permissions associated with the role */,
  "role_description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the role was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)
